verdict.judge_synthesis_notes: The judge correctly identified the Saguaro cactus as limiting the location to the Sonoran Desert (US/Mexico). It correctly identified the yellow center line as non-discriminatory. It effectively used the Meta agent's observation of the white pipe delineator as the decisive 'tie-breaker' to distinguish Mexico from the US, aligning perfectly with the ground truth.
